data.title: Seven Bank Completes Treasury Stock Acquisition, Changes Parent Company
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Seven Bank, Ltd. ( (JP:8410) ) has shared an update.

Seven Bank, Ltd. has completed a significant acquisition of treasury stock, resulting in a change of its parent company. This move is part of a strategic initiative by its former parent, Seven & i Holdings Co., Ltd., to reduce its ownership stake, thereby enhancing Seven Bank’s management independence and corporate value. The acquisition was executed through the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s off-auction trading system, allowing for efficient completion and contributing to improved capital efficiency.

More about Seven Bank, Ltd.

Seven Bank, Ltd. operates in the financial industry, primarily providing banking services. The company focuses on delivering stable shareholder returns while investing in future growth, aligning with its medium-term management plan.

Average Trading Volume: 6,537,452

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: Yen310.6B

GoldHaven Resources ( (TSE:GOH) ) has provided an update.

GoldHaven Resources Corp. has filed its unaudited interim consolidated financial statements and management discussion and analysis for the period ending April 30, 2025. This filing marks an important step in maintaining transparency and providing stakeholders with insights into the company’s financial health and strategic direction.

GoldHaven Resources’ overall stock score is low due to severe financial distress marked by zero revenue, persistent losses, and negative cash flows. More about GoldHaven Resources

GoldHaven Resources Corp. is a Canadian junior exploration company focused on acquiring and exploring highly prospective land packages in North and South America. Its projects include the Magno Project in British Columbia, the Three Guardsman Project, the Copeçal Gold Project in Brazil, and three critical mineral projects in Brazil.

data.title: Citigroup Reduces Stake in Cettire Ltd.
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Cettire Ltd. ( (AU:CTT) ) has shared an announcement.

Citigroup Global Markets Australia Pty Limited has reduced its voting power in Cettire Ltd. from 7.5865% to 5.6940%. This change is due to a decrease in relevant interests in Cettire’s shares, primarily through securities lending agreements. The reduction in Citigroup’s stake may impact Cettire’s shareholder dynamics and influence within the company, potentially affecting its market positioning and strategic decisions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CTT) stock is a Sell with a A$1.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cettire Ltd. stock, see the AU:CTT Stock Forecast page.

More about Cettire Ltd.

Cettire Ltd. operates in the fashion retail industry, specializing in luxury fashion products. The company focuses on providing a wide range of high-end clothing, accessories, and footwear through its online platform, catering to a global market of fashion enthusiasts and consumers seeking premium brands.

data.title: Emmerson Resources Announces Board Changes Amidst Strategic Growth
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Emmerson Resources Limited ( (AU:ERM) ) has provided an update.

Emmerson Resources Limited announced changes to its board, with Andrew McIlwain and Dr. Allan Trench retiring after long tenures, marking a transition under the new leadership of Mark Connelly as Non-Executive Chair. These changes come as the company is poised for growth, with anticipated cash flow from gold royalties and the development of the White Devil Gold Deposit, positioning Emmerson strongly in the market.

More about Emmerson Resources Limited

Emmerson Resources Limited is a company focused on exploration in the Tennant Creek Mineral Field, one of Australia’s highest-grade gold and copper fields. The company has a significant land position and is involved in discovering high-grade gold and copper deposits using advanced technology. Emmerson is also exploring early-stage gold-copper projects in New South Wales, leveraging predictive targeting models to identify underexplored areas.

Nishi-Nippon Railroad Co., Ltd. ( (JP:9031) ) has provided an announcement.

Nishi-Nippon Railroad Co., Ltd. has repurchased 1,835,500 shares of its common stock at a total acquisition cost of 3.7 billion yen through the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s off-auction own share repurchase trading system. data.title: InhaleRx Limited Secures R&D Tax Rebate to Bolster Financial Position
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An announcement from InhaleRx Limited ( (AU:IRX) ) is now available.

InhaleRx Limited has received a $402,000 rebate from its FY2024 Research and Development Tax Incentive claim, which will be used for working capital and partial repayment of a funding facility with Clendon Biotech Capital. Additionally, the company expects an extra $88,000 from an amended FY2023 tax return, further supporting its working capital. This financial boost aids InhaleRx in its continued development of drug-device products, potentially strengthening its market position and benefiting shareholders.

More about InhaleRx Limited

InhaleRx Limited is an Australian drug development company focused on creating unique medicinal drug-device products aimed at addressing unmet medical needs in pain management and mental health sectors. The company is pursuing U.S. FDA approval through rapid and cost-effective regulatory pathways, targeting conditions such as Breakthrough Cancer Pain and Panic Disorder, where current treatment options are limited.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$8.54M
